detail.description:
Welcome to Cookingo, your peaceful little escape from the hustle and bustle of everyday life. In this game, cooking is more than just making food—it’s a foodie haven, where you can savor each calm and happy moment.

Your mission is simple: craft all the fresh ingredients into delightful creations.
- Chop & Slice: Feel your rhythm as you softly slice fruits and veggies.
- Whisk & Mix: Watch colors swirl and textures blend while soothing ASMR sounds wrap around you like a cozy blanket.
- Perfect P
detail.releaseNotes:
- Enhanced user's experience.
- Fixed some bugs
- Added 4 new levels
